title: Repo Sync
subtitle: Repository structure syncing and workflow automation tool
description: A development tool focused on keeping repository structures consistent across projects and devices.
It helps automate repetitive tasks involved in syncing files, templates, and shared project layouts.
features: Synchronize files and structures across multiple repositories
Synchronize files and structures across multiple devices
Reduce manual duplication of shared assets and templates
Support consistent project organization across branches
Designed to integrate into development workflows and automation scripts
synchronize one or all repositories it manages
Ability to report errors encountered during use
Ability to submit suggestions and improvement ideas

howItWorks: Repo Sync compares directory structures and file sets between repositories.
It identifies differences and applies updates to keep projects aligned with a defined structure.
apiStructure: Core modules handle directory comparison and file operations.
Functions are designed to be reusable for scripting and automation workflows.
